entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The crop grown in the dryland agroecosystem study

entities.name: PLASTIC FILM MULCHING
entities.description: A soil management practice using plastic films to cover the soil surface

entities.name: NO FILM MULCHING
entities.description: A control soil management practice without the use of plastic films

entities.name: NITROGEN APPLICATION RATE
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen fertilizer applied to the soil, ranging from 0 to 300 kg·hm−2

entities.name: SOIL EXTRACELLULAR ENZYME ACTIVITIES
entities.description: The activity levels of enzymes secreted by soil microorganisms into the soil environment

entities.name: SOIL ENZYME STOICHIOMETRY
entities.description: The stoichiometric ratio of different soil extracellular enzyme activities

entities.name: BETA-1,4-GLUCOSIDASE
entities.description: An enzyme involved in the carbon cycle of soil microorganisms

entities.name: LEUCINE AMINOPEPTIDASE
entities.description: An enzyme involved in the nitrogen cycle of soil microorganisms

entities.name: BETA-1,4-N-ACETYLAMINOGLUCOSIDASE
entities.description: An enzyme involved in the nitrogen cycle of soil microorganisms

entities.name: ALKALINE PHOSPHATASE
entities.description: An enzyme involved in the phosphorus cycle of soil microorganisms

entities.name: SOIL MICROORGANISMS
entities.description: Microbes in the soil that drive nutrient cycling through enzyme secretion

entities.name: NUTRIENT CYCLING
entities.description: The process of microbial nutrient cycling in the ecosystem

entities.name: SOIL NUTRIENT CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of nutrients present in the soil

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A key nutrient involved in soil enzyme activity and microbial cycling

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: A key nutrient involved in soil enzyme activity and microbial cycling

entities.name: CARBON
entities.description: A key nutrient involved in soil enzyme activity and microbial cycling

entities.name: RDA
entities.description: Redundancy Analysis used to identify factors affecting enzyme activities

entities.name: CORRELATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical analysis used to determine relationships between soil properties and enzyme activities

entities.name: SOIL PH
entities.description: The acidity or alkalinity of the soil, affecting enzyme activities

entities.name: MAIZE GROWTH STAGES
entities.description: The developmental stages of maize including seedling, jointing, trumpet, grout, and harvest stages
